scope: Research questions 9–13: data/sources, legislation/visa changes, country risk/direction, segment criteria, user research
methodology: Desk research using official, institutional, commercial and community sources; source IDs embedded in Markdown files.
limitations: Not a substitute for legal, tax or immigration advice.
Country-specific rules must be rechecked before operational use.
Community sources are treated as user-pain signals, not legal evidence.
Primary interviews are recommended for product validation.
